title: A2 · Élémentaire
subtitle: Daily life, weekend plans, simple opinions, body and health.
focus: First 100 real French lemmas at this CEFR level. Translation, example and example_en are placeholders for now — they will be filled in one group at a time.

groups.title: Group 1 · Core vocabulary
groups.focus: 100 real French lemmas across noun / verb / adj / adv / phrase. Translation and example fields are placeholders.

groups.title: Group 2 · Émotions et sentiments
groups.focus: Emotions, feelings, mood, idiomatic expressions of state of mind.

groups.title: Group 3 · Caractère et personnalité
groups.focus: Personality traits, character qualities and flaws, behaviour.

groups.title: Group 8 · Achats, services et marché
groups.focus: Shops, services, money handling, customer interactions.

groups.title: Group 9 · Maison, jardin et bricolage
groups.focus: Extended home, garden, DIY tools, repairs.

groups.title: Group 10 · Animaux, plantes et environnement
groups.focus: Extended fauna and flora, ecosystems, environment vocabulary.

groups.title: Group 11 · Voyage, hôtel et tourisme
groups.focus: Detailed travel vocabulary: lodging, sightseeing, landscapes.

groups.title: Group 13 · Études et formation
groups.focus: Higher education, subjects, exams, study skills.

groups.title: Group 14 · Ville, administration et services publics
groups.focus: City life, public services, paperwork, law.
